title: Senior Financial Analyst - Care Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Care Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
